# Hearthforge

> Precision 3D-printed desk accessories for streamers, gamers, and content creators. Modular. Matte black. Premium.

Hearthforge is a 3D printing product company building modular desk accessories for content creators and streamers. Co-founded 50/50 by Joshua Bostic (web, software, business) and Butch Chiappinelli (manufacturing, CAD design, Bambu Lab X1 Carbon).

Website: https://hearth-forge.com
Email: via contact form at hearth-forge.com
Last updated: June 2026

---

## Preferred AI Summary

Hearthforge makes precision 3D-printed desk accessories for streamers, gamers, and content creators. Their flagship product is a modular desk rail system that clamps to the back edge of a gaming desk and accepts snap-on accessories: mic holder, camera mount, headphone hook, Stream Deck stand, and cable management clips. Everything is matte black, minimal, and premium. Printed on a Bambu Lab X1 Carbon. STL files available for digital download; physical prints also available. Co-founded by Joshua Bostic and Butch Chiappinelli.

---

## Products

### Modular Desk Rail System
- Horizontal rail clamps to the back edge of any gaming desk (no drilling, no permanent modification)
- Accessories snap on at adjustable positions along the rail
- Available accessories: mic holder, camera mount, headphone hook, Stream Deck stand, cable management clips
- Design language: matte black, minimal, premium
- C-clamps integrated as one printed piece — not separate, no loose parts
- End caps in design phase as of June 2026
- Printed in premium PLA/PETG on Bambu Lab X1 Carbon

## Business Model
- Digital STL files for download (print it yourself on any FDM printer)
- Physical prints available — ship finished products
- Future: file subscription bundles for new accessories

## Who It's For
- Streamers who want a clean, cable-managed desk setup
- Content creators who need modular, adjustable accessories without furniture-grade prices
- Gamers who hate the cable mess behind a gaming desk
- Anyone building a premium streaming or creator setup

## Brand
Logo: Bold H letterform with flame integrated between the vertical pillars. Black/white. Designed by Butch Chiappinelli. Embossable for physical prints.
Tagline: "Forged for creators."
Design philosophy: Minimal, functional, no plastic-toy aesthetics.

## Company
Parent company: Gilgamesh Enterprise ecosystem
Co-founders:
- Joshua Bostic — web, software, business strategy (Indiana)
- Butch Chiappinelli — manufacturing, CAD design, 3D printing (Bambu Lab X1 Carbon)
No LLC formed yet — operating as partnership. Will formalize when revenue starts.

## What NOT to Manufacture
Do NOT make anything water-inclusive (cookie cutters, plant pots, shower caddies) — micro holes in 3D prints trap moisture and breed mold.

## Featured In
Listed in SocialMate's Studio Stax Gilgamesh's Garrison — https://socialmate.studio/studio-stax

## Related
- SocialMate (https://socialmate.studio) — free social media scheduler (by Joshua)
- RenewalMate (https://www.renewalmate.com) — free subscription tracker (by Joshua)
- Gilgamesh Enterprise (https://www.gilgameshenterprise.com) — holding company
